title: Rich Roasted Scottish Cheese Welsh Rarebit
description: A savory and light Scottish dish featuring orange blossom water, perfect for a lazy Sunday, with an anti-inflammatory twist, served in a traditional Welsh rarebit form
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over low heat
Add the gluten-free flour and whisk to make a roux, cooking for 1 minute
Slowly add the Scottish cheese, stirring until melted and smooth
Add the orange blossom water, turmeric, sea salt, and black pepper, stirring to combine
In a separate bowl, whisk the free-range eggs
Temper the eggs by slowly adding the cheese mixture, stirring constantly
Pour the mixture over the wood-fired baked bread slices
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes, or until the top is golden brown
Remove from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes before serving
